3096470.name: Datacenter
3096470.description:
About This Game
Datacenter is a game where you design, build, and manage your very own server empire. Packets come from the Internet to you and it's your mission to reply them back, with your own servers and network infrastructure. Optimize packet flow for maximum throughput, earn money to upgrade your hardware and explore new locations to build more datacenters. Watch out for malware damaging your infrastructure! The world has networking demands and you are in charge of providing them! 

Features:

  • Build & Expand: Continuously construct, upgrade, and optimize your datacenter for maximum packet throughput.

  • Research Tree: Unlock new devices, equipment and software that boosts your devices.

  • Global Expansion: Explore unique geographic locations, each with its own challenges and demands (electricity cost, unexpected government fees, sudden spikes of network traffic).

  • Interconnected Systems: Link your datacenters across the world to create a resilient global network.

  • Challenging Scenarios: Face increasing network traffic, evolving malware, unexpected outages, malfunctioning equipment. Keep your score up to get that datacenter with the highest certification!
